children.heading: Registered apprenticeship program
children.label: 1 Registered apprenticeship program
children.text: The term “registered apprenticeship program” means an apprenticeship program registered under the Act of (; commonly referred to as the “National Apprenticeship Act”).August 16, 193750 Stat. 664

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Labor.

children.heading: Additional registered apprenticeship program requirements
children.label: b Additional registered apprenticeship program requirements
A
children.text: is aware of the availability of educational assistance for a veteran or other individual eligible under chapters 30 through 36 of title 38 for use in connection with a registered apprenticeship program;

children.label: B
children.text: will make a good faith effort to obtain approval for educational assistance described in subparagraph (A) for, at a minimum, each program location that employs or recruits a veteran or other individual eligible for educational assistance under chapters 30 through 36 of title 38; and

children.label: C
children.text: will not deny the application of a qualified candidate who is a veteran or other individual eligible for educational assistance described in subparagraph (A) for the purpose of avoiding making a good faith effort to obtain approval as described in subparagraph (B);

children.label: A
children.text: is enrolled in the registered apprenticeship program; and

children.label: i
children.text: has a demonstrated competence applicable to the apprenticeship occupation; or

children.label: ii
children.text: has acquired experience, training, or skills through military service that is applicable to the apprenticeship occupation; and

when the Secretary approves the registered apprenticeship program, provide a copy of the program’s certificate of registration to the State approving agency designated under chapter 36 of title 38 in the State where the program is located.
